pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh (line 23) and export_result.sh (line 27) which both use '/default-domain/workspaces/Drop-Box' with hyphen. Workspace created with name parameter 'Drop-Box' (line 47 of setup_task.sh) which becomes the path component.
Verified against task description (line 5) which explicitly states: 'rename it to Contract - Acme v2''. This is the target title agents must achieve.

Verified against setup_task.sh lines 74, 76, 79 which all reference file named 'Scan_Invoice_992_Q3.pdf'. Task description line 5 confirms this is the file to move.

Verified against setup_task.sh lines 85, 87 which create file named 'IMG_Site_Photo_0023.jpg'. Task description line 5 confirms this is the file to move.

Code analysis of setup_task.sh lines 73-80 copies annual_report_2023.pdf from /workspace/data/. File exists (verified with file command). PDF metadata shows: Creator='unspecified', Producer='ReportLab PDF Library (opensource)', CreationDate='D:20260222122538'. Content is synthetic ACME Corporation Annual Report.

pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh lines 84-88. Script uses 'convert -size 640x480 xc:skyblue' if ImageMagick is available, otherwise creates dummy text file. Both are synthetic.

privileged_info_summary: The actual Drop Box path in the deployed system is '/default-domain/workspaces/Drop-Box' (with hyphen), contradicting the metadata claim of '/default-domain/workspaces/Drop Box' (with space). This inconsistency would cause agents to fail if they navigate to the wrong path. All target file names and renaming expectations are correct: contract to 'Contract - Acme v2', invoice to 'Invoice 992 Q3', image to 'Site Photo 0023'. All data is synthetic: the contract file does not exist and will be created as a minimal dummy PDF, the invoice is a ReportLab-generated synthetic annual report, and the image is either ImageMagick-generated or a dummy text file.
